code:
export const blogData = [{
  id: 1,
  slug: 'scaling-saas-architecture-2026',
  title: 'Scaling SaaS Architecture: Best Practices for 2026',
  excerpt: 'Learn how to build a multi-tenant architecture that can handle millions of users with zero downtime.',
  content: `Scaling a SaaS platform requires a deep understanding of multi-tenancy, database sharding, and edge computing. In 2026, the focus has shifted towards serverless architectures that offer granular scalability. We recommend starting with a robust API gateway and implementing distributed caching at every layer. 

Multi-tenant isolation is no longer just about data security; it's about performance isolation. Noisy neighbor problems can be mitigated using dedicated throughput limits per tenant. Furthermore, the adoption of globally distributed databases like CockroachDB or Aurora Global has made it easier to serve users with low latency across the world.`,
  category: 'Technology',
  image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?q=80&w=2072&auto=format&fit=crop',
  createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
}, {
  id: 2,
  slug: 'it-trends-redefining-enterprise',
  title: '5 IT Trends Redefining Enterprise Software',
  excerpt: 'From AI-driven automation to low-code platforms, discover the technologies shaping the future of IT.',
  content: `Enterprise software is undergoing a massive transformation. AI integration is now at the core of every business process, from automated customer support to predictive maintenance in manufacturing. 

We are also seeing a surge in "composable enterprise" strategies, where businesses build their software ecosystem using specialized, interoperable components rather than monolithic suites. Security-as-code is another trend that is becoming mandatory, integrating security protocols directly into the CI/CD pipeline.`,
  category: 'IT Trends',
  image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?q=80&w=2026&auto=format&fit=crop',
  createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 86400000).toISOString()
}, {
  id: 3,
  slug: 'startup-growth-strategies',
  title: 'Startup Growth: Mastering the Technical Roadmap',
  excerpt: 'Avoid technical debt while scaling your startup. A guide for CTOs and product owners.',
  content: `Startups often face a dilemma: move fast and break things, or build for the future. The key is to balance immediate delivery with a long-term architectural vision. 

Technical debt is inevitable, but it must be managed. Regular refactoring sessions and automated testing can prevent a startup's codebase from becoming a bottleneck. Choosing the right stack early on—ideally one with a large talent pool and robust community support—can save thousands of hours in the long run.`,
  category: 'Startups',
  image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop',
  createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 172800000).toISOString()
}, {
  id: 4,
  slug: 'digital-marketing-for-it-companies',
  title: 'Digital Marketing Strategies for B2B IT Services',
  excerpt: 'How IT companies can leverage content marketing and SEO to drive high-quality leads.',
  content: `Marketing IT services is different from B2C products. It's about building trust and demonstrating expertise. Content marketing through technical whitepapers, case studies, and expert blogs is highly effective. 

SEO for IT services should focus on high-intent long-tail keywords. LinkedIn remains the primary platform for B2B engagement, where sharing engineering insights can position a company as a thought leader.`,
  category: 'Marketing',
  image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1432888622747-4eb9a8f2c207?q=80&w=2069&auto=format&fit=crop',
  createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 259200000).toISOString()
}, {
  id: 5,
  slug: 'future-of-work-remote-engineering',
  title: 'The Future of Work: Scaling Remote Engineering Teams',
  excerpt: 'Best practices for managing global development teams and maintaining culture.',
  content: `Remote work is no longer an experiment; it's the standard for engineering. Scaling a remote team requires asynchronous communication protocols and robust documentation. 

Tools like Slack and Zoom are just the beginning. Real success comes from building a culture of transparency and output-oriented performance metrics. Weekly "all-hands" meetings and regular virtual social events can help maintain team cohesion across time zones.`,
  category: 'Business',
  image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522071820081-009f0129c71c?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop',
  createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 345600000).toISOString()
},
// Adding 35 more placeholder-style entries to reach 40
...Array.from({
  length: 35
}).map((_, i) => ({
  id: i + 6,
  slug: `post-${i + 6}`,
  title: ['Modern Frontend Paradigms', 'The Shift to Edge Computing', 'Cybersecurity in the Age of AI', 'Product-Led Growth Explained', 'Serverless vs Containers', 'Mastering UI/UX Design', 'Data Privacy Regulations 2026', 'The Role of DevOps in 2026', 'Cloud Cost Optimization', 'Building Resilient Systems'][i % 10] + ` (Part ${Math.floor(i / 10) + 1})`,
  excerpt: 'Exploring the latest shifts in modern engineering and business strategies for global growth.',
  content: 'Full detailed content coming soon in our weekly technical digest. This article explores the deep intricacies of modern systems and business logic.',
  category: ['Technology', 'IT Trends', 'Startups', 'Marketing', 'Business'][i % 5],
  image: `https://images.unsplash.com/photo-${[1460925895917, 1519389950473, 1451187580459, 1432888622747, 1522071820081][i % 5]}?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80`,
  createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - (i + 5) * 86400000).toISOString()
}))];

sourcesContent:
export const blogData = [
  {
    id: 1,
    slug: 'scaling-saas-architecture-2026',
    title: 'Scaling SaaS Architecture: Best Practices for 2026',
    excerpt: 'Learn how to build a multi-tenant architecture that can handle millions of users with zero downtime.',
    content: `Scaling a SaaS platform requires a deep understanding of multi-tenancy, database sharding, and edge computing. In 2026, the focus has shifted towards serverless architectures that offer granular scalability. We recommend starting with a robust API gateway and implementing distributed caching at every layer. 

Multi-tenant isolation is no longer just about data security; it's about performance isolation. Noisy neighbor problems can be mitigated using dedicated throughput limits per tenant. Furthermore, the adoption of globally distributed databases like CockroachDB or Aurora Global has made it easier to serve users with low latency across the world.`,
    category: 'Technology',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?q=80&w=2072&auto=format&fit=crop',
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    slug: 'it-trends-redefining-enterprise',
    title: '5 IT Trends Redefining Enterprise Software',
    excerpt: 'From AI-driven automation to low-code platforms, discover the technologies shaping the future of IT.',
    content: `Enterprise software is undergoing a massive transformation. AI integration is now at the core of every business process, from automated customer support to predictive maintenance in manufacturing. 

We are also seeing a surge in "composable enterprise" strategies, where businesses build their software ecosystem using specialized, interoperable components rather than monolithic suites. Security-as-code is another trend that is becoming mandatory, integrating security protocols directly into the CI/CD pipeline.`,
    category: 'IT Trends',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?q=80&w=2026&auto=format&fit=crop',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 86400000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    slug: 'startup-growth-strategies',
    title: 'Startup Growth: Mastering the Technical Roadmap',
    excerpt: 'Avoid technical debt while scaling your startup. A guide for CTOs and product owners.',
    content: `Startups often face a dilemma: move fast and break things, or build for the future. The key is to balance immediate delivery with a long-term architectural vision. 

Technical debt is inevitable, but it must be managed. Regular refactoring sessions and automated testing can prevent a startup's codebase from becoming a bottleneck. Choosing the right stack early on—ideally one with a large talent pool and robust community support—can save thousands of hours in the long run.`,
    category: 'Startups',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 172800000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    slug: 'digital-marketing-for-it-companies',
    title: 'Digital Marketing Strategies for B2B IT Services',
    excerpt: 'How IT companies can leverage content marketing and SEO to drive high-quality leads.',
    content: `Marketing IT services is different from B2C products. It's about building trust and demonstrating expertise. Content marketing through technical whitepapers, case studies, and expert blogs is highly effective. 

SEO for IT services should focus on high-intent long-tail keywords. LinkedIn remains the primary platform for B2B engagement, where sharing engineering insights can position a company as a thought leader.`,
    category: 'Marketing',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1432888622747-4eb9a8f2c207?q=80&w=2069&auto=format&fit=crop',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 259200000).toISOString()
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    slug: 'future-of-work-remote-engineering',
    title: 'The Future of Work: Scaling Remote Engineering Teams',
    excerpt: 'Best practices for managing global development teams and maintaining culture.',
    content: `Remote work is no longer an experiment; it's the standard for engineering. Scaling a remote team requires asynchronous communication protocols and robust documentation. 

Tools like Slack and Zoom are just the beginning. Real success comes from building a culture of transparency and output-oriented performance metrics. Weekly "all-hands" meetings and regular virtual social events can help maintain team cohesion across time zones.`,
    category: 'Business',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1522071820081-009f0129c71c?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop',
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - 345600000).toISOString()
  },
  // Adding 35 more placeholder-style entries to reach 40
  ...Array.from({ length: 35 }).map((_, i) => ({
    id: i + 6,
    slug: `post-${i + 6}`,
    title: [
      'Modern Frontend Paradigms',
      'The Shift to Edge Computing',
      'Cybersecurity in the Age of AI',
      'Product-Led Growth Explained',
      'Serverless vs Containers',
      'Mastering UI/UX Design',
      'Data Privacy Regulations 2026',
      'The Role of DevOps in 2026',
      'Cloud Cost Optimization',
      'Building Resilient Systems'
    ][i % 10] + ` (Part ${Math.floor(i / 10) + 1})`,
    excerpt: 'Exploring the latest shifts in modern engineering and business strategies for global growth.',
    content: 'Full detailed content coming soon in our weekly technical digest. This article explores the deep intricacies of modern systems and business logic.',
    category: ['Technology', 'IT Trends', 'Startups', 'Marketing', 'Business'][i % 5],
    image: `https://images.unsplash.com/photo-${[1460925895917, 1519389950473, 1451187580459, 1432888622747, 1522071820081][i % 5]}?auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80`,
    createdAt: new Date(Date.now() - (i + 5) * 86400000).toISOString()
  }))
];
